experiment_title: 氢氧化钠与氯化钡溶液分别与硫酸铜溶液反应的实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="氢氧化钠与氯化钡溶液分别与硫酸铜溶液反应的实验" goal="比较氢氧化钠溶液和氯化钡溶液与硫酸铜溶液反应时沉淀的生成及其颜色，验证相关化学反应方程式。" difficulty="Easy" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="measuring_cylinder" type="measuring_cylinder" capacity="50ml" />
      <Component id="dropper" type="dropper" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="NaOH_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="BaCl2_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="CuSO4_solution" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="NaOH" volume="5 mL" tool="measuring_cylinder" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="BaCl2" volume="5 mL" tool="measuring_cylinder" id="step_1" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="CuSO4" volume="2 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_2" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="CuSO4" volume="2 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_3" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_4" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_5" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 分别向两支试管中准确量取氢氧化钠溶液和氯化钡溶液，为后续反应做准备。
向两支试管中分别加入硫酸铜溶液，观察反应现象。
